title: Works Miracles
summary: You can heal others with a touch, alter time to help others, and are generally beloved by everyone.
tiers: Tier 3: Font of Healing or Miraculous Health
Tier 6: Greater Healing Touch or Restore Life
gm_intrusions: Attempts to heal might cause harm instead. A community or individual needs a healer so desperately that they hold one against their will.
text: You can heal others with a touch, alter time to help others, and are generally beloved by everyone.
details: You can heal others with a touch, alter time to help others, and are generally beloved by everyone.
